name: edumetric-crm
description: AI-powered transparent scholarship evaluation and student growth monitoring platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
